/usr/bin/ar qc libnds.a CMakeFiles/nds.dir/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/mmu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/arm7.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/arm7_arm_instr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/arm7_thumb_instr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/arm9.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/arm9_arm_instr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/arm9_thumb_instr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/lcd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/swi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/cp15.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/dma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/gamepad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/opengl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/rtc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/gamecard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/apu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/gx_render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/slot2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nds.dir/ntr_027.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnds.a
